user_story: As an HR admin, I want to view the survey email template list, so that I can confirm the survey email is configured
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Survey Email Templates screen; When the list loads; Then I see the Email type, Description and Task columns

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to open and view the Survey Email template, so that I can review its content
acceptance_criteria: Given the survey email templates are listed; When I click View on the Survey Email row; Then the template content is displayed

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to refresh the survey email templates list, so that I always see current data
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Survey Email Templates screen; When I click Refresh; Then the list reloads

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to switch to the Notification Templates view for surveys, so that I can manage the notification channel as well
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Survey Email Templates screen; When I select the Notification Templates tab; Then the notification templates are shown
